title: Project: DWELLERS
description: A modpack, focused on Horror Experiences
body:
Project DWELLERS is a modpack focused on horror mods, bringing the user, a immersive and scary experience, with tense ambience, cave sounds, and creatures around the map, you will explore the map, and discover what happened in the world, because these creatures aren't from earth

**they are called DWELLERS**

![Project Dwellers](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c5bba5d69e5b4b57b2dd1b4f592f4e8f3be1b045.png)

If you need the Optifine version
You have to go to my Website.

[Website](https://canonical-modpacks.framer.website/)
